narrative:
Miami Township V (precinct in Clermont County) has 658 registered voters, with 65.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.9%, a clear Republican lean of 8.7 percentage points.
